expectations.text: The command uses 'codex exec' (NOT 'codex exec review') since this is an options review, not a code review
The command includes all 3 options in the prompt (SQLite WAL, PostgreSQL pooling, Redis cache)
The prompt includes context about 10000 concurrent users
expectations.evidence: Prompt includes context about 10000 concurrent users

expectations.text: The command includes '-m gpt-5.4' to specify the correct model
The output contains Codex/GPT analysis evaluating the options
expectations.evidence: Full analysis with per-option evaluation, trade-off table, and recommendation

expectations.text: The agent presents the analysis with some framing or synthesis
expectations.evidence: Result presented with structured sections and recommendation

eval_feedback.overall: Without the skill, the agent still performed well on this task — options review is straightforward enough that the skill provides marginal benefit.
